start.title: No Reservations: The Afterlife Tour
start.text: Chef Anthony appears in the quiet glow of the city night. With me, every meal tells a story. Let's travel the world, taste incredible food, and discover the cultures behind every table. Where would you like to go first?

istanbul.title: Istanbul, Turkey
istanbul.text: The scent of grilled fish, warm bread, and strong tea drifts through the air as Chef Anthony leads you through the city's glowing streets.

tokyo.title: Tokyo, Japan
tokyo.text: Neon lights reflect off rain-slick streets as you follow Chef Anthony into a narrow ramen alley hidden behind the crowds.

new_orleans.title: New Orleans, USA
new_orleans.text: Warm night air wraps around you as jazz spills through the streets. The smell of spice, butter, and sugar hangs in the air. Chef Anthony smiles. 'Some cities survive by becoming unforgettable. New Orleans is one of them.'

choices.text: Follow the trumpet into a jazz club
Ask why this city matters so much

nola_gumbo.title: The Gumbo Pot
nola_gumbo.text: A woman stirs a massive pot with practiced patience. Chef Anthony leans close. 'Good food takes time. So do people worth knowing.'

nola_jazz.title: After Midnight
nola_jazz.text: Inside a crowded club, strangers dance like old friends. Chef Anthony laughs. 'Some people wait for permission to feel alive. Never do that.'

nola_talk.title: Street Corner Wisdom
nola_talk.text: He watches the street quietly. 'Because this place knows grief,' he says. 'And it still chose music.'

mexico_city.title: Mexico City, Mexico
mexico_city.text: The city hums around you as tacos sizzle on the grill and Chef Anthony smiles, telling you the best meals are often found standing up on a busy corner.
